description: Detectives have seized a ZIP archive of documents suspected to contain hidden image evidence embedded within the files. Create a forensic case in Autopsy named 'Document_Triage_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-DOC-001') using /home/ga/evidence/govdocs/000.zip as the data source. Extract all images embedded within parent documents (such as PDFs or DOCX files) using the 'Embedded File Extraction', 'File Type Identification', and 'Hash Lookup' (MD5) modules. Catalog the extracted images in a pipe-delimited file at /home/ga/Reports/embedded_media.csv using the header: PARENT_DOCUMENT|EMBEDDED_FILENAME|MIME_TYPE|SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH. Additionally, write an investigative summary to /home/ga/Reports/embedded_summary.txt containing the case name, data source, the count of unique parent documents containing embedded media, and the total count of extracted images.
